purpose: QA-driven RealVisXL hand/contact close-up profile after portrait-plus-hands prompts repeatedly collapsed into clasped, overlapping, or prompt-drifted hands.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic close-up editorial photograph of one adult right hand resting flat on a simple wooden tabletop, only one hand visible, wrist and tailored shirt cuff visible, palm side down, five readable fingers naturally separated, accurate knuckles, realistic fingernails, subtle veins, natural skin pores, soft wrinkles at finger joints, believable wrist anatomy, clean cuff edge above the wrist, clear contact shadows beneath each fingertip and the side of the hand, realistic table grain texture, soft studio window lighting, shallow depth of field, photographic color grading, 70mm macro portrait lens
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, CGI, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed texture, face, head, full person, second hand, two hands, clasped hands, interlocked fingers, folded hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, webbed fingers, duplicated thumb, broken wrist, twisted wrist, distorted nails, melted fingertips, warped sleeve, cloth melting into skin, floating hand, no contact shadow, object covering fingers, pen, ring, jewelry, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, blurry

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Removes face/portrait framing from the local hand-contact test and isolates a single right hand flat on a tabletop.
